brief: Compose a RelatedCourses section component (RelatedCourses.tsx, named export) using ONLY components imported from '@upskill/components'. It renders inside an existing page (no main landmark), but it is itself a section landmark. Contents: a Heading; a grid of CardVerticals built from a 6-item data array, showing only the first 3 until expanded; a show-more Button in the ghost variant, labelled 'Show more', with a chevron-down icon after the label that must render in the button's own text color; and below the grid one AccordionItem titled 'Why these recommendations?' whose open state the section holds in React state. Spacing must come from the layout components' token-based props — no hand-written CSS, inline spacing styles, or media queries.
